summary: Frontend-only regression test for the 'Can't find variable: useRouter' runtime error. Verified fix in /app/frontend/app/country/[code].tsx (imports for Pressable and useRouter now present). All requested flows pass: Home loads cleanly; Rota tab → tapping country-PT, country-FR, country-RU opens detail pages without any useRouter/Pressable runtime error; PT detail shows hero with 'Portugal', curiosities list, and 'Cidades nesta etapa' section with 2 place links from /api/places; tapping a place link successfully navigates to /place/{id}; Diary tab lists 3 entries; opening each entry renders the new copy (Lagos / 'Roma Termini' reference, Lisboa, Barcelona → Lyon). 0 console errors and 0 page errors captured across all flows.

issues: Duplicate style key 'cityRow' in StyleSheet.create() at lines 119 and 127 — the second definition overrides the first. Currently harmless because the chip layout still works via the parent flex-wrap, but it is confusing and a latent bug. Rename one (e.g. 'cityChipsRow' vs 'cityListRow').

action_items: Optional cleanup: rename one of the duplicate 'cityRow' style keys in /app/frontend/app/country/[code].tsx (StyleSheet defined twice on lines 119 and 127).
critical_code_review_comments: country/[code].tsx fix is correctly applied — Pressable and useRouter are now imported on line 2 and line 4 respectively.
Minor: duplicate StyleSheet key 'cityRow' (lines 119 & 127) — RN merges by key, so the chip-row variant is silently dropped. Not breaking but should be cleaned up.
seed_data_creation: None — used existing seed data (places & diary entries already populated).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix verified end-to-end via Playwright mobile viewport (390x844). country-PT shows 2 place links from /api/places, place navigation works. All 3 diary entries open and contain expected copy. Only nit found is the duplicate 'cityRow' style key in country/[code].tsx — not user-visible.
rca_of_issue: Root cause: CitiesList sub-component inside /app/frontend/app/country/[code].tsx referenced useRouter() and rendered <Pressable>, but the file's imports only contained useLocalSearchParams (from expo-router) and View/Text/etc. (no Pressable from react-native). Hermes/JSC therefore threw 'Can't find variable: useRouter' the moment the Cities list rendered (which happens after /api/places resolves). Fix: added Pressable to the 'react-native' import line and added useRouter to the 'expo-router' import. Verified by opening all 3 requested country pages plus diary detail pages — 0 errors.
